title: create flight
description: the modpack for the create flight smp!
body:
### CF modpack is now managed using Automodpack, and so there isnt much of a need for this anymore, however you can still join the discord linked if you are interested)


(archived desc)
~~Create: Flight, Season 4 Modpack~~

~~Create: Flight! An SMP that focuses mainly on the create mod, VS, and a fun and interesting community!~~

~~CFS4 *is* public! Join us :D~~
![s4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbcf5680c110393491a01153254f2014611d7d36.png)

~~Thank you to everyone who has helped with preparing for S4! Starting January 24th @ 10 AM EST!~~
